headline: Bunge Corn Exports And Futures Deliveries Put Valuation In Focus
summary: Bunge Global (NYSE:BG) issued all overnight corn deliveries for first notice day, taking a central role in recent corn export flows. The USDA reported a sizeable private export sale of corn to unknown destinations, with Bunge closely linked to current shipment activity. These moves came as corn futures saw active trading, putting extra focus on how Bunge is handling physical deliveries. For investors watching NYSE:BG, this pickup in corn delivery activity comes with the stock trading around...
